title: KISS-over-BLE GATT service not implemented
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/include/lichen/transport/kiss_transport.h:85-90 provides only the §5.5 UUID macros. spec/kiss-framing.md §5.5: 'LICHEN exposes a BLE GATT service for KISS connectivity' with a normative UUID table. No GATT service, no TX/RX characteristic wiring, no KISS-over-BLE path, no TODO. UUID byte order itself verified correct.
